query: SELECT a.id, a.clientId, a.scheduledDate, a.status, a.createdAt, c.name, c.whatsappPhone FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.clientId = c.id ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3
